site.name: Calc Empire
site.tagline: Free online calculators that show the math.
site.author: Roma

calculators.title: Mortgage Recast Calculator
calculators.description: See your new monthly payment after a lump-sum recast. Amortization schedule, interest saved.

calculators.title: No-Vig Calculator
calculators.description: Strip the sportsbook vig from any odds line to find the fair implied probability.

calculators.title: Dividend Calculator
calculators.description: Project dividend income with or without DRIP. Year-by-year compounding, total return shown.

calculators.title: Variance Calculator
calculators.description: Sample and population variance from a data set, plus mean and standard deviation.

calculators.title: Asphalt Calculator
calculators.description: Tons of hot-mix asphalt needed for a driveway or lot, with density and depth controls.

calculators.title: Mixed Number Calculator
calculators.description: Add, subtract, multiply, divide mixed numbers and improper fractions. Reduced result shown.

calculators.title: Paycheck Calculator
calculators.description: Take-home pay after federal, FICA, state, and pre-tax. 50-state pages linked.

calculators.title: A1C Calculator
calculators.description: Convert A1C to estimated average glucose (eAG) in mg/dL or mmol/L. ADA-endorsed formula.

calculators.title: Creatinine Clearance Calculator
calculators.description: Cockcroft-Gault for drug dosing or CKD-EPI 2021 for kidney-function staging. KDIGO band.

calculators.title: Options Profit Calculator
calculators.description: Long/short call & put P&L at expiration. Native payoff chart, breakeven, max profit/loss.

calculators.title: Chronological Age Calculator
calculators.description: Exact age in years, months, days, hours from any date of birth to today.

calculators.title: Weighted Grade Calculator
calculators.description: Final course grade from weighted categories. Target-grade calculator for the last assignment.

calculators.title: Money Market Calculator
calculators.description: Project money-market balance with APY, monthly contribution, daily compounding.

calculators.title: Square Footage Calculator
calculators.description: Sq ft of a room from length × width in feet, inches, or meters. Multi-room totals.

calculators.title: Standard Deviation Calculator
calculators.description: Sample and population standard deviation, variance, and mean from a list of numbers.

calculators.title: Dog Age Calculator
calculators.description: Dog years to human years via the 2019 epigenetic-clock formula. Compares to classic 7× rule.

calculators.title: Median Calculator
calculators.description: Median, quartiles (Q1, Q3), and IQR of any number set. Sorted view shown.

calculators.title: Steps to Miles Calculator
calculators.description: Steps to miles using height-based stride length. Or work backwards from a mile goal.

calculators.title: Average Calculator
calculators.description: Mean, median, and mode of any list of numbers. Knows when to use each.

calculators.title: Fractions Calculator
calculators.description: Add, subtract, multiply, divide two fractions. Reduced + mixed-number form, step by step.

calculators.title: Height Calculator
calculators.description: Predict a child's adult height with the mid-parental method. Inch and centimeter support.

calculators.title: Quadratic Formula Calculator
calculators.description: Solve ax² + bx + c = 0. Real or complex roots, discriminant, and vertex of the parabola.

calculators.title: Rounding Calculator
calculators.description: Round to any decimal place — nearest, up, down, or banker's (round-half-to-even).

calculators.title: Cumulative GPA Calculator
calculators.description: Roll up semester GPAs by credit hours. Plus the GPA you need next term to hit a target.

calculators.title: Decimal to Fraction Converter
calculators.description: Convert decimals to reduced fractions and back. Handles repeating decimals.

calculators.title: Tip Calculator
calculators.description: Split a restaurant bill, calculate gratuity, US tip norms built in. Tax-inclusive toggle.

calculators.title: Slope Calculator
calculators.description: Slope from two points, y-intercept, and the line equation y = mx + b.

calculators.title: Max Heart Rate Calculator
calculators.description: Max HR via Fox, Tanaka, or Gulati. Five training zones in bpm — endurance to VO2 max.

calculators.title: Period Calculator
calculators.description: Next period start, ovulation day, and fertile window from your last period and cycle length.

calculators.title: Cubic Yard Calculator
calculators.description: Cubic yards of concrete, mulch, or topsoil from L × W × D. Rectangle or circle.

calculators.title: Percent Off Calculator
calculators.description: Sale price after a percent-off discount, plus the dollars saved and the percent paid.

calculators.title: Discount Calculator
calculators.description: Final price after one or two stacked discounts. Percent off and dollar off supported.

calculators.title: High School GPA Calculator
calculators.description: Letter grades + credit hours to a 4.0 GPA. Honors/AP/IB weighted boost optional.

calculators.title: Square Root Calculator
calculators.description: Square root with 10-digit precision and simplified radical form (e.g. 5√2).

calculators.title: Long Division Calculator
calculators.description: Quotient and remainder with the full step-by-step long-division view.

calculators.title: Factor Calculator
calculators.description: Every factor and the prime factorization of any positive integer. Flags primes and perfect squares.

calculators.title: Protein Intake Calculator
calculators.description: Daily protein grams from body weight, activity level, and goal (cut, maintain, bulk).

calculators.title: Scientific Notation Calculator
calculators.description: Convert numbers to scientific notation a × 10ⁿ and back. Engineering notation supported.

calculators.title: P-Value Calculator
calculators.description: Z-score to one- or two-tailed p-value. Plain-English interpretation of significance.

calculators.title: Stock Profit Calculator
calculators.description: Profit, return percent, and breakeven price on a stock trade. Optional buy/sell fees.

calculators.title: Capital Gains Tax Calculator
calculators.description: Federal capital-gains tax on a sale. Short-term vs long-term brackets, NIIT included.

calculators.title: Gravel Calculator
calculators.description: Cubic yards and US tons of gravel for a driveway, walkway, or base. Density override.

articles.title: Best Free AI Video Generator (2026)
articles.description: Side-by-side review of the top free AI video tools, tested in 2026.

articles.title: Best AI Humanizer
articles.description: Which AI humanizers actually pass detectors. Scored on tone, fidelity, and cost.
